TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Zihing Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Zihing a niyaro', 76 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 256 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 242 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Zihing Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Zihing a niyaro', 79 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 230 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal90%, Bunun1%, roma2%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *iħiŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *iħiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. *iħiŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *iħiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Zihing Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Zihing a niyaro', 76 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 256 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 242 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal91%, Amis1%, roma1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Zihing Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Zihing a niyaro', 79 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 230 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 16 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal90%, Bunun1%, roma2%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *iħiŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *iħiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. *iħiŋ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *iħiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
